description: Système d'alertes multi-palier pour la gestion des échéances de baux selon le droit locatif belge. Calcul automatique de la catégorie légale (courte durée/9 ans/longue durée), paliers d'alerte (critique/warning/deadline), décisions gestionnaire (renouveler/résilier/tacite accepté), UI enrichie sur onglet contrats + fiche détail.

userStories.title: Types & logique métier expiry
userStories.description: As a developer, I want LeaseCategory, AlertTier, and ContractExpiryInfo types plus pure helper functions so that the expiry logic is testable and reusable.
acceptanceCriteria: LeaseCategory type added to contract.types.ts (courte_duree | neuf_ans | longue_duree)
AlertTier type added (critical | warning | deadline | null)
ContractExpiryInfo interface added with all fields (leaseCategory, daysRemaining, alertTier, noticeDeadlineDays, noticeDeadlineDate, noticeDeadlinePassed, tacitRenewalRisk)
Pure functions in contract.service.ts: getLeaseCategory(), getNoticeDeadlineDays(), getAlertTier(), getExpiryInfo()
userStories.notes: Types added to contract.types.ts, pure functions in lib/utils/lease-expiry.ts (client-safe), re-exported from contract.service.ts. enrichWithCalculations extended.

userStories.title: Repository: élargir findExpiringSoon à 270 jours
userStories.description: As a developer, I want findExpiringSoon() to support up to 270 days window so that long-term leases are captured early enough for legal notice.
acceptanceCriteria: findExpiringSoon() default param stays 30 but accepts up to 270
getExpiringSoon() service method passes dynamic window based on max alert threshold (270)

userStories.title: Server action: setExpiryDecision
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to record my expiry decision (renew/terminate/accept tacit) so that the alert disappears and my choice is tracked.
acceptanceCriteria: New server action setExpiryDecision(contractId, decision) in contract-actions.ts
Writes to contracts.metadata.expiry_decision with decision, decided_at, decided_by
userStories.notes: Server action writes to metadata.expiry_decision JSONB. Auth check + team access + revalidation.

userStories.title: Contracts navigator: filtre dynamique + exclusion décision prise
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the 'Expirent bientôt' tab to show contracts within the legal alert window (180j/270j) and hide those where I already made a decision.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter uses getExpiryInfo() to determine if contract is in alert window
Contracts with metadata.expiry_decision are excluded from the tab
Tab count reflects filtered contracts correctly
userStories.notes: Filter uses getExpiryInfo() from lib/utils/lease-expiry.ts (client-safe). Server/client boundary solved by extracting pure functions.

userStories.title: Contract expiry banner component
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see a color-coded alert banner on expiring contracts showing the tier, countdown, deadline date, and tacit renewal risk.
acceptanceCriteria: 3 color variants: orange (critical), red (warning), dark red (deadline)
Shows: tier label, days until notice deadline, deadline date formatted, tacit renewal risk text
Shows 'Deadline dépassée' state when past deadline
userStories.notes: 3 color variants (orange/red/dark red), tier badge, countdown, deadline date, tacit risk. Compact mode for cards.

userStories.title: Contract expiry actions component
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want 3 action buttons (Renouveler, Résilier, Tacite accepté) on expiring contract cards so that I can make a decision directly.
acceptanceCriteria: 3 buttons: Renouveler (links to /contrats/nouveau?renew=id), Résilier (calls terminateContract), Tacite accepté (calls setExpiryDecision)
Confirmation dialog for Résilier and Tacite accepté
userStories.notes: 3 buttons with AlertDialog confirmations. Renouveler routes to /contrats/nouveau?renew=id. Loading states + onRefresh callback.

userStories.title: Intégrer banner + actions dans contract-card.tsx
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see the expiry banner and action buttons directly on contract cards in the 'Expirent bientôt' tab.
acceptanceCriteria: When expiryInfo has alertTier, shows ContractExpiryBanner above card content
Shows ContractExpiryActions below card content when in alert
Card border color changes to match alert tier
userStories.notes: Card border color matches alert tier. Banner above content, actions below with border separator. expiryInfo passed only on expire_bientot tab.

userStories.title: Intégrer banner sur fiche détail contrat
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see the expiry alert banner on the contract detail page so that I'm warned when viewing any expiring contract.
acceptanceCriteria: Contract detail page computes expiryInfo server-side via enrichWithCalculations
ContractDetailsClient renders ContractExpiryBanner + ContractExpiryActions at top when alert active
Banner contextual: shows lease category, deadline, risk
userStories.notes: Computes expiryInfo client-side for active contracts. Banner + actions rendered above EntityPreviewLayout when alert active.
